chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1555 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 24.10.2016. Mr. Muhammad Yameen Narban, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Anwar H. Ansari, State Counsel alongwith SIP Ghulam Ali Kanhio P.S Tando Adam and SIP Ghazi Khan SHO P.S Berani. -.-.-. The petitioner, inter alia, contends that private respondents are causing him harassment though the father of respondent No.6 has sold out the land in question, viz: 02-14 acres in Survey No. 75 situated in Deh Berani Taluka Jam Nawaz Ali District Sanghar. According to him, he has announced a residential scheme over the subject property but now all the private respondents are causing immense mental torment, hence he has invoked the constitutional jurisdiction of this Court. Today, counsel for private respondents has filed vakalatnama on behalf of private respondents No.6 to 17 and stated that if they have any grievance, they will invoke the appropriate remedy. On this statement, instant petition stands disposed of with the observation that Respondents shall not cause harassment to the petitioner, but will be at liberty to seek their remedy through due process of law. JUDGE Ali Haider
